name: @agent-index/filesystem-gdrive
description: Agent Index Filesystem — Google Drive adapter (on-demand executor)

scripts.build:exec: esbuild src/exec.mjs --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/aifs-exec.bundle.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: Agent Index
